libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required. Generate tests against documented Janino 3.1.0 APIs such as ExpressionEvaluator, ScriptEvaluator, SimpleCompiler, ClassBodyEvaluator, or Compiler with in-memory source. Do not reuse the old org.codehaus.janino.util.iterator.Iterables import from the 3.0.16 test; if iterator utilities are still tested, use the relocated commons-compiler package exposed by Janino's transitive org.codehaus.janino:commons-compiler dependency.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8855 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.codehaus.janino:janino:3.1.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests copied mechanically from 3.0.16 may continue to fail javac because org.codehaus.janino.util.iterator.* is no longer present in janino 3.1.0.
Janino has an optional/provided Ant integration dependency, but it is not needed for normal Janino coverage and should only be added if tests intentionally exercise AntCompilerAdapter.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed for meaningful Janino coverage; the failure is caused by test code importing an API package that was removed/relocated after 3.0.16, not by missing setup.
